title: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: Stock forecast and analyst predictions for Robinhood Markets from Simply Wall St analysis. Analyst Consensus: 23 analysts covering the stock with consensus Buy rating. Average price target of $105.87 implies 35% upside. Earnings Growth Forecast: 11.4% annual earnings growth forecast. 12.8% annual revenue growth forecast. EPS growth expected at 10.6% per annum. Profitability Metrics: Strong earnings growth expected to exceed industry average of 14.8%. Adjusted EBITDA margin expansion continues. Valuation Perspective: Trading at premium multiples justified by growth trajectory. Recent decline to more reasonable valuations creates opportunity. Price Target Range: Low estimate around $85-90. High estimate around $125. Most common target around $110. Risk Factors: Cryptocurrency market volatility creates earnings swings. Trading volume cyclicality poses downside risk. Competitive pressure from other fintech platforms. Regulatory changes could impact business model. Positive Catalysts: Pattern Day Trader rule elimination. Prediction market expansion. International growth. Gold subscriber momentum. Crypto market recovery potential.
